Class SteveWalkLogic

java.lang.Object
tailFinder.logic.SteveWalkLogic
public abstract class SteveWalkLogic extends Object
Manages player character (Steve) movement, collision detection, and physics. Handles keyboard input, walking/jumping mechanics, flight mode, and gravity checks. Implements ground-based physics with cooldowns and spec mode (flight mode).

  • Constructor Details

    • SteveWalkLogic

      public SteveWalkLogic()

  • Method Details

    • keyInput

      public static void keyInput(javafx.scene.input.KeyEvent keyEvent)
      Processes keyboard input events (KEY_PRESSED and KEY_RELEASED). Updates the active keys set and triggers jump when SPACE is pressed. Only processes input while the world is running.
      Parameters:
      keyEvent - the keyboard event to process

    • updateMovement

      public static void updateMovement()
      Updates player movement based on currently active keys and game mode. In spec mode (flight): allows free movement in all directions without gravity. In normal mode: applies ground physics with walking cooldown and collision detection. Also handles walking sounds with cooldown. The movement is bounded by the map size to prevent leaving the game world.

    • checkWalk

      public static boolean checkWalk(int row, int column)
      Validates if the player can walk to a specific tile position. Checks for map boundaries and that both the body block and head block are passable. In spec mode, returns true (flight allows any movement).
      Parameters:
      row - the target row position
      column - the target column position
      Returns:
      true if the position is walkable, false if blocked or out of bounds

    • isGrounded

      public static boolean isGrounded()
      Checks if the player is currently standing on solid ground. Returns true if the block below the player is solid (not passable).
      Returns:
      true if player is on solid ground, false if in air or over map edge

    • jump

      public static void jump()
      Makes the player jump if possible. Player can only jump when grounded and not on slime or lava. Jump reaches 3 blocks high and validates the entire jump path is clear. Applies jump animation and sound, then sets cooldown.

    • isPathClearForJump

      private static boolean isPathClearForJump(int startRow, int endRow, int col)
      Validates that the entire jump path from start to end is clear of obstacles. Scans every block in the upward path to prevent jumping into solid blocks. In spec mode, always returns true (flight mode ignores physics).
      Parameters:
      startRow - the player's current row position
      endRow - the target row (peak of jump)
      col - the column position (no horizontal jump)
      Returns:
      true if every block in the path is passable, false if any block is solid
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - indirectly if bounds checking fails (safety check)

    • clearKey

      public static void clearKey()
      Clears all active keys from the input buffer. Used when returning to the menu to prevent input carryover.

    • isWalk

      public static boolean isWalk()
      Checks if the player can perform a walk action.
      Returns:
      true if walk is available, false if in cooldown

    • setWalk

      public static void setWalk(boolean walk)
      Sets the walk availability state.
      Parameters:
      walk - true to enable walking, false to start cooldown

    • isJump

      public static boolean isJump()
      Checks if the player can jump.
      Returns:
      true if jump is available, false if in cooldown

    • setJump

      public static void setJump(boolean jump)
      Sets the jump availability state.
      Parameters:
      jump - true to enable jumping, false to start cooldown

    • isFalling

      public static boolean isFalling()
      Checks if the player is currently falling.
      Returns:
      true if gravity is active, false if falling is disabled

    • setFalling

      public static void setFalling(boolean falling)
      Sets the falling/gravity state.
      Parameters:
      falling - true to enable gravity, false to disable

    • setSpecMode

      public static void setSpecMode(boolean newSpecMode)
      Sets spec mode (flight/creative mode) state.
      Parameters:
      newSpecMode - true to enable flight mode, false for normal mode

    • getSpecMode

      public static boolean getSpecMode()
      Checks if spec mode (flight/creative mode) is active.
      Returns:
      true if flight mode is enabled, false for normal mode

    • isAscending

      public static boolean isAscending()
      Checks if the player is currently ascending (during a jump).
      Returns:
      true if player is moving upward, false otherwise

    • setAscending

      public static void setAscending(boolean isAscending)
      Sets the ascending state during jump animation.
      Parameters:
      isAscending - true if player is moving upward, false otherwise
